name: ELED Fresnel 100WW

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: E3B4C4D5-E275-4D7B-926A-65AF0EE673F4

comment: Elation ELED Fresnel 100WW: The ELED Fresnel Series brings all the advantages of Light Emitting Diodes into Stage Lighting. Featuring a 100W LED light source (500W halogen equivalent) and an amazing zoomrange it offers reliable, easy and cost saving lighting in Clubs, Theatres, Schools and Churches as well as at exhibitions, trade fairs and at commercial applications. Imagine an "unbreakable" lightsource and ultralow heat development (compared to conventional halogen lights), full DMX control, and improved zoom capabilities. There is no need for running thick power multicores, installing expensive dimmerracks and high-power current supply anymore while at the same time expiring the whole advantage of LED based lighting.

gwSpecs.description: The ELED Fresnel Series brings all the advantages of Light Emitting Diodes into Stage Lighting. Featuring a 100W LED light source (500W halogen equivalent) and an amazing zoomrange it offers reliable, easy and cost saving lighting in Clubs, Theatres, Schools and Churches as well as at exhibitions, trade fairs and at commercial applications. Imagine an "unbreakable" lightsource and ultralow heat development (compared to conventional halogen lights), full DMX control, and improved zoom capabilities. There is no need for running thick power multicores, installing expensive dimmerracks and high-power current supply anymore while at the same time expiring the whole advantage of LED based lighting.
